delegation_capability.evidence_ref: The current Codex session exposed built-in default-agent spawn, wait/status, message/follow-up, interrupt, and registry capabilities. No proof-relevant child was dispatched because the mandatory external native-Windows platform gate blocked the run during clean pre-edit preflight.

objective: Execute the approved HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot packet from clean preflight through test-first implementation, full cross-platform proof, fresh review until CLEAN, primary commit, separate parent closeout, and stop without beginning HCM-2.2.

sections: HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot proof gate
P0 — Revalidate entry and freeze the implementation subject
P6 — Run the full implementation proof wall
P9 — Commit and close the parent orchestration

work_completed: Resolved the exact selected implementation-packet-approved handoff from ledger.jsonl and confirmed record/index parity.
Replayed the final seventeen-entry planning subject manifest exactly as sha256:a8452c7b788bc2efe3e69891ad2d6baf5e0913fc58489c55fb5bf0756263ec4d.
Confirmed the exact shipped profile, project_context descriptor path, kind definition, schema entry, and schema document bytes remain unchanged.
Replayed the literal HCM-1.2 package-definition manifest against the live engine tree and packaged crate with exact 29-member path, size, SHA-256, and byte equality.
Read the repository onboarding runner, selected packet, required skills, exact authority sections, proof gate, and true-stop protocol.
Ran all three handoff validator modes successfully and refreshed the GitNexus index with npx gitnexus analyze --index-only.
Inspected the live macOS host, installed Rust targets, repository Actions workflow inventory, remote branch state, Azure VM inventory, and prior native-Windows proof precedent before any code edit.

deliverables.summary: Implementation remains byte-unchanged because the packet's mandatory native-Windows runtime proof is unavailable in this top-level execution environment.

decisions.summary: Stop before behavior-changing edits because the mandatory native-Windows runtime proof is unavailable to this top-level orchestrator.
decisions.authority_effect: The approved packet explicitly rejects Windows cross-compilation as a substitute for native validate-only and fail-before-mutation author/doctor/flow execution. Beginning implementation on this macOS task would knowingly create an uncloseable slice and violate the frozen preflight stop condition.

findings.summary: The current host is macOS arm64; installed Windows Rust targets provide cross-compilation only; the repository's active CI workflow has no Windows job; no Windows Azure VM is present; and this task has no native-Windows command execution channel. Therefore the mandatory runtime proof cannot execute in this run.

blockers.summary: No native Windows MSVC execution host or runner is accessible to the current top-level orchestrator for the packet's validate-only and fail-before-mutation Project Context author/doctor/flow runtime proof.
blockers.resume_condition: Resume this exact selected HCM-2.1 implementation session on a native Windows MSVC host where the top-level Codex task can run repository commands, or provide an authorized native-Windows runner that can exercise the exact final review-bound subject without widening the packet's file scope.

validation.command: Exact shipped Project Context profile/kind/schema/path byte checks

Manifest sha256:a7678b8f3761e681e98f2b5e94459f4568c4d2ff9851e329bc5f776856829a23 matched source/package exact sets, sizes, hashes, and bytes.

validation.command: python3 validate_handoffs.py plus both required self-test modes
validation.evidence_ref: Normal validation, historical v1 admission self-test, and orchestration-contract self-test all passed before closeout.
Incremental index completed successfully with 13,488 nodes, 24,524 edges, 355 clusters, and 300 flows.
Host is arm64 macOS 15.7.7. Windows GNU/MSVC are installed only as Rust cross-compilation targets, which the SPEC says cannot substitute for native Windows runtime proof.

validation.command: Inspect .github/workflows/ci.yml, GitHub workflow inventory, and Azure VM inventory
validation.evidence_ref: CI uses Ubuntu and macOS only; the only active workflows are CI and Release; the Azure subscription currently contains only a Linux VM; no native Windows runner is accessible to this task.

validation.command: Native Windows validate-only and pre-mutation author/doctor/flow runtime proof
validation.evidence_ref: Requires a native Windows MSVC execution environment after implementation; cross-compilation on macOS is not valid proof.

resume.objective: Resume the exact HCM-2.1 implementation packet from clean pre-edit preflight, execute it test-first, prove it on native Windows MSVC, obtain fresh clean review, and complete the two-commit closeout without starting HCM-2.2.
resume.condition: A native Windows MSVC host is the active Codex execution environment, or an authorized native-Windows runner is directly accessible to the top-level orchestrator for the exact final subject before behavior-changing edits begin.

sections: P0 — Revalidate entry and freeze the implementation subject

HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot proof gate

allowed_scope: Use the exact existing HCM-2.1 SPEC.md, tasks/plan.md, and tasks/todo.md packet without reopening reviewed planning bytes.
Edit only the exact engine, compiler, CLI, flow, focused template/fixture/test, control-pack, proof, dispatch, and closeout paths allowlisted by the HCM-2.1 SPEC.
Use the native Windows execution mechanism only for the packet's required runtime and already-authorized cross-platform proof.
prohibited_scope: Do not begin implementation until native Windows runtime execution is available to the top-level orchestrator.
Do not add or modify CI, Cargo manifests, lockfiles, definition assets, schemas, profiles, descriptors, pipeline/stage code, or HCM-2.2+ work merely to manufacture platform proof.
Do not treat cross-compilation, Wine, macOS, Linux, or compile-only checks as native Windows runtime evidence.
Do not modify or supersede the approved planning bytes without new evidence and explicit planning authority.
acceptance_criteria: Preflight identifies an accessible native Windows MSVC execution path and records how the exact final subject will be exercised without forbidden-scope changes.
Native Windows validates supplied canonical Project Context input and proves non-validate authoring refuses before any mutation while doctor and flow fail closed with the packet's exact reasons.
Every remaining HCM-2.1 implementation, regression, package, scope, security, fresh-review, and two-commit closeout gate passes exactly as frozen.
stop_conditions: Stop again with external_blocker if native Windows runtime execution is still unavailable or cannot exercise the exact final subject.
Stop if satisfying the platform gate would require a file or authority outside the approved HCM-2.1 packet.
Stop on any other frozen HCM-2.1 stop condition rather than widening scope.

chat_summary: HCM-2.1 stopped during clean pre-edit preflight. The approved packet requires native Windows runtime proof and explicitly rejects cross-compilation as a substitute; this macOS task has no accessible Windows execution channel. Resume the exact selector on a native Windows MSVC task or with an authorized runner, without widening the frozen packet.
